title: Security: console.log still allows loading images via %c formatter
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
I noticed that the fix for https://crbug.com/chromium/1223475 is imcomplete.  
An attacker can still load images via the console.log.  
  
  
PoC #1:  
console.log("%caaa","background:url(httpS://attacker.example.com/)")  
  
  
PoC #2:  
console.log("%caaa","background:
